parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  school_id: $node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.school_id || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.school_id,
  sender_jid: $node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.sender_jid || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.sender_jid,
  raw_message_id: ($node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.response_id || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.response_id || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.raw_message_id || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.raw_message_id || ("n8n-" + ($node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.sender_jid || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.sender_jid || "unknown") + "-" + ($node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.received_at || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.received_at || "no-date"))),
  body: ($node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.message_text || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.message_text || (($node["GET Session Context"].json.messages || []).filter(m => m.text).slice(-1)[0]?.text) || "[mensagem sem texto]"),
  student_id: $node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.student_id || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.student_id || $node["GET Session Context"].json.student_id || null,
  campaign_id: $node["GET Session Context"].json.campaign_id || null,
  identity_confidence: "HIGH",
  needs_review: true,
  handoff_reason: $json.handoff_reason || "handoff",
  detected_intent: $json.detected_intent || $json.intent || "HUMANO",
  risk_level: $json.risk_level || "LOW",
  received_at: $node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.received_at || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.received_at
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  school_id: $node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.school_id || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.school_id,
  sender_jid: $node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.sender_jid || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.sender_jid,
  raw_message_id: ($node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.response_id || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.response_id || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.raw_message_id || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.raw_message_id || ("n8n-" + ($node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.sender_jid || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.sender_jid || "unknown") + "-" + ($node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.received_at || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.received_at || "no-date"))),
  body: ($node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.message_text || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.message_text || (($node["GET Session Context"].json.messages || []).filter(m => m.text).slice(-1)[0]?.text) || "[mensagem sem texto]"),
  student_id: $node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.student_id || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.student_id || $node["GET Session Context"].json.student_id || null,
  campaign_id: $node["GET Session Context"].json.campaign_id || null,
  reason: $json.category === "DOENCA" ? "ILLNESS" : ($json.category === "TRABALHO" ? "WORK" : ($json.category === "TRANSPORTE" ? "SCHOOL_ISSUE" : ($json.category === "FAMILIA" ? "FAMILY" : "OTHER"))),
  ai_confidence: $json.confidence,
  identity_confidence: "HIGH",
  needs_review: false,
  detected_intent: $json.intent || "JUSTIFICATIVA_FALTA",
  risk_level: $json.risk_level || "LOW",
  received_at: $node["Webhook Chat"].json.body?.received_at || $node["Webhook Chat"].json.received_at
}) }}
